title: Hexalia
description: A magical mod focusing on plant-based magic and rustic applications. It adds witchery, rituals, brewing new potions, and more.
body:
![Hexalia](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b1665e3b0004e479a5ac6476a61e12d31ab6271_0.webp) [![Join Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1064760109760253952?color=brightgreen&label=Discord)](https://discord.gg/fcbH6BqW3X) [![Curseforge Downloads](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/full_962878_downloads.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hexalia) ### **About** Hexalia is a nature-themed magic mod that focuses on rituals, herbal alchemy, and enchanted flora. Gather herbs and crops, refine them with simple tools, and perform rituals powered by salt and elemental nodes. Awaken enchanted plants with unique abilities, brew mystical brews with lasting effects, and craft idols to command the weather or purify cursed gear. From transmuting blocks with Mutavis and Morphora, to wielding the Kelpweave Blade or throwing toxic sacs of herbs, Hexalia offers a lightweight yet deep magical progression that blends naturally into survival and exploration. ### Showcases:
Spoiler
### **Add-Ons** ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/962878/description_76139245-7034-4349-92b0-779eef4d4793.png) [Hexforged](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hexforged-hexalia-addon) Hexforged expands Hexalia mystical world with ancient rituals, elemental magic and wilalchemy. Harness the primal power of fire, water, air, and earth—each granting unique abilities in battle. Infuse your weapons with Essence Coatings, unlocking temporary powers drawn from nature’s raw energy. Brew new potent concoctions and wield magical relics like the Howlroot Horn, steeped in the magic of Mandrake root. Through ritual and discovery, uncover forgotten magic and power. ### **Additional Information** 🛠️ **Development Status** This mod is a **work in progress**, with more features planned for future updates. As we continue learning **coding, modeling, and texturing**, we invite you to follow our journey and share feedback! 📦 **Modpack/Addon Usage** You’re welcome to include Hexalia in your modpacks, or make addons with it. Enjoy!
